---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for QE-Copilot
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / Use Case

What are you trying to do that QE-Copilot doesn't currently support?
<!-- e.g. "I want to run tests in parallel but the framework only supports sequential execution" -->

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Which part of the framework does this affect?

- [ ] `AGENT.md` — agent behaviour / boot sequence / execution protocol
- [ ] `templates/` — testcase, action, defect, or report templates
- [ ] `knowledge/` — knowledge graph structure
- [ ] `configs/` — configuration options
- [ ] `actions/` — action library
- [ ] `testdata/` — test data handling
- [ ] MCP tool usage
- [ ] Reporting
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? What didn't work about them?

## Example

<!-- If possible, show what the YAML or config would look like with this feature -->

```yaml
# example
```

## Additional Context

<!-- Links, references, or any other context -->
